payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current active memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded by mem_new, so presenting mem_old as current would be incorrect.
payload.decision: recall returned the newer active memory and excluded the older superseded memory

entity_resolution.reason: The recall query referred to Sam from Goldman, matching the entity context used by the active memory. The older memory was not treated as current because its lifecycle status is superseded.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was returned because it is the current, non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was filtered because it has been marked as superseded by mem_new and should not be presented as current.

details: Did not present the superseded memory as current.
